chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 647 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.2702/2020 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on CMA No.2703/2020 08.10.2025 Mr. Talha Abbasi advocate for the applicant Mr. Abdul Manan, advocate Dr. Wasif Ali Memon, Chairman, Sindh Revenue Board Mr. Zamir A. Khalid, Commissioner (Legal) Sindh Revenue Board Learned counsel for Sindh Revenue Board states that since this matter pertains to a remand order, it may be just and proper for the adjudicating officer to re-adjudicate the lis unencumbered by any observation. Order accordingly. This reference application is disposed of. The presence and assistance of worthy Chairman SRB is appreciated and dispensed with. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, Sindh Revenue Board, Karachi, as required by section 63 of the Sindh Sales Tax on Services Act 2011. Judge Judge Amjad
